args: set -a; if [ -f .env ]; then . ./.env; fi; set +a; if [ -z "${Z_AI_MODE}" ]; then export Z_AI_MODE=ZHIPU; fi; exec npx -y @z_ai/mcp-server

set -a; if [ -f .env ]; then . ./.env; fi; set +a; for p in $(which uvx 2>/dev/null) $HOME/.local/bin/uvx /opt/homebrew/bin/uvx /usr/local/bin/uvx uvx; do [ -x "$p" ] && exec "$p" --from git+https://github.com/BeehiveInnovations/zen-mcp-server.git zen-mcp-server; done; echo 'uvx not found' >&2; exit 1
